mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_odm_exposure ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_odm_exposure WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_odm_exposure WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_odm_exposure (employee_name, employee_no, department, hazard_factor, exposure_level, exposure_standard, exposure_period, risk_level, exceed_count, exposed_workers, measurement_date, remarks, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{employeeName}, #{employeeNo}, #{department}, #{hazardFactor}, #{exposureLevel}, #{exposureStandard}, #{exposurePeriod}, #{riskLevel}, #{exceedCount}, #{exposedWorkers}, #{measurementDate}, #{remarks}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_odm_exposure SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, department = #{department}, hazard_factor = #{hazardFactor}, exposure_level = #{exposureLevel}, exposure_standard = #{exposureStandard}, exposure_period = #{exposurePeriod}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, exceed_count = #{exceedCount}, exposed_workers = #{exposedWorkers}, measurement_date = #{measurementDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
